feed.title: SAP Community - SAP R/3
feed.subtitle: SAP R/3 Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Lines with No Open Qty on Scheduling Agreement still appears on ZDSR report
entry.content:
Hello all,

My organization uses the ZDSR100 report to determine what is past due/has not shipped. 

We recently started using scheduling agreements for blanket orders and have been having some issues with items that have already shipped and have no open qty still showing up as past due.

Is there a way to prevent lines with no open qty from showing up on our ZDSR100 report without removing the line from the scheduling agreement? (I've been told that if you remove any lines manually, it could prevent future schedules from posting via EDI. Is this true?)

Thanks everyone in advance for your assistance!

entry.title: MRP run not to consider batches with expiry date
entry.content:
Dear team

We want to run MRP for 6 months and we do not want MRP to consider batches which are going to expire in 6 months in future.

 

BR

Ramesh Kumar

entry.title: Automatic Barcode Label Printing via Control Key automatic GR
entry.content:
Hi all,

(#SAP R/3 is used in my company)

I have a question related with trigger of barcode label printing via control key automatic GR. I have 1 customized control key that provide automatic goods receipt after confirmation (Production order).  After this step, I would like to have barcode label automatically. For this purpose, I have created a new output type via spro (M706) that the application is ME (Inventory Management). Related program and PDF/smart form is added to the output type. Also, I used §§ function that provide created by. Medium is 1-print output (Partner functions in output type). Then, I created condition records for movement type 101 and event type WF and created by my user via MN21 according to the access method that include Plant-Function (§§)-Partner (My username)-Medium (1-Print output)-Date/time (3 Send with application own transaction)- language.

The result is: Once I use migo (mb31) for the goods receipt of production order, I have the label print automatically. Condition record is triggered. However, once I use control key confirmation and automatic goods receipt, I do not have any spool. 

Question is: Do you have any advice for me which point should I change or add to have automatic barcode label after automatic goods receipt via control key?

Thanks in advance for your support.

**I have solved it: change the event type as WR. This one was the wrong point.

entry.title: Connect SAP 4.7 to SAP Netweaver Gateway as a Hub Deployment
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have requirement to connect SAP 4.7 system with SAP NW gateway system (as a hub deployment). We are planning to expose o-data services through NW gateway system.  But as a first step can we really connect SAP 4.7 with gateway 2.0 as 4.7 doesn't have netweaver components?

If not, then can we have webservice created in SAP 4.7 to expose the data to SAP UI5 applications?

Thank you in advance for your valuable input.

entry.title: Business Partner as leading object in ECC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on a preproject for and S/4HANA conversion and in doing so we need to activate the CVI.

As you probably know usually the BP will only get activated technically as it is a prerequisite for the conversion and the customer/supplier remain the leading object while still on ECC.

My client now requests to use the Business Partner as the leading object on ECC already, but I cannot find any documentation on that, nor do I have any experience with it.

Does anyone of you know if it is even possible to make use of the Business Partner as Customer/Supplier before going to S/4HANA and what the consequences would this have on the ECC system?

Hope you can help me out with this, thanks in advance.

 

Best regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: Storno Abrechnung PSP Elemente
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

wir rechnen PSP-Elemente periodisch auf Anlagen ab. Aufgrund eines Mitarbeiterweggangs wurde diese Abrechnung über einen längeren Zeitraum versäumt. Nun haben wir eine Abrechnung für den aktuellen Monat gemacht und festgestellt, dass alte Perioden noch nicht abgerechnet wurden. Die alten Perioden lassen sich aber nicht abrechnen, weil schon Abrechnungen in Folgemonaten gelaufen sind. Ich bekomme diese Fehlermeldung: "Abrechnung vor AbrPeriode 002 2025 erst nach Stornierung möglich". Hat jemand einen Tipp, wie ich die alten Perioden abrechnen kann ohne die Abrechnungen der Folgemonate zu stornieren?

Danke euch!

entry.title: E2000 R/3 MM MARA MFRNR change to text field?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I just want to know, if it is possible to edit  the Field MFRNR in order to be able to write alphanumerical input.

entry.title: IN KE5Z REPORT KRW IS NOT REPORTING CORRECTLY
entry.content:
SAP/PCA module with cash flow accounts in a company code  in this closing in the transmission with decimal positions in these accounts and they reported incorrectly to PCA module/OS.

Movements and balances should be as per SAP in A30 KRW in the Asset Mmodule system where you can see for example in the raabga01  asset module report . However, they were reported with coma moved positions.

Example they should report 82,189,869  but in KE5z it is reporting 8,218,386,900

entry.title: How to check the breakup of the Planned value of Goods Issue of production order
entry.content:
Dear All,

The planned value of the goods issue of the production order is far more than the actual value of Goods Issue resulting in variance. Kindly suggest how I can check the breakup of Goods issue planned value so as to detect and rectify the error in calculation of planned goods issue value.

entry.title: SAP Error M7018: WBS Element Input Required
entry.content:
Dear All,

In SAP S/4HANA, when registering a delivery document, the system unexpectedly prompts for a WBS element, even though the PS module is not being used in this process.

Could you please help me understand the possible reason or configuration that might cause this behavior?

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Using SOAP API as a replacement for DESADV Idoc on ECC 7.5 - how to?
entry.content:
Dear all,

currently we are using an ECC 7.5 an getting DESADV Idoc's from a 3rd-party System.
Now we have to switch to SOAP Webservices and have to replace the Idocs.

The Inbound Delivery (A2X) "Process inbound deliveries using this synchronous inbound service" described on Business Accelerator Hub seems to fit on S/4HANA. How and where to find solutions for ECC 7.5?

Many thanks in advance and regards,
Dirk

entry.title: What kinds of instances are there in SAP R/3?
entry.content:
i want to understand finally what are all the passible instances types, and what each instances include.
thank you 🙂

entry.title: SAP ECC - sales order with item and schedule line not displayed in MD04
entry.content:
Hi, 

I created a sales order with a schedule line category that allows the Purchase Requisition creation and requirement type KEB (it means that when the goods are received they are in sales order stock).

When the order is unblocked and the user run MD04, he can see the line with the sales order and sales order item, the line with MRP element number "CustSt" 

but not the line with sales order, sales order item and schedule line, the line with MRP element number "CustOrd":

Could someone tell me why?

 

Thanks, 

Regards

entry.title: OVA8 - Days Open Items fields aging methodology
entry.content:
Can someone of the SAP develment team provide 100% confirmation if the OVA8 fields "NoDays OpenI" and "Days Oldest OpenI" count the "Days" of the FBL5N line items from the date of posting date. Or is it like some posts on OVA8 saying that it are the days of overdue (days past the due date of the invoice/item calculated based on Bline date)?

Additionally, will it include or preferrably, can it exclude open uncleared payment differences that are aged in the FBL5N line items?

entry.title: Does anywhere exists dbmssslib.so version 640?
entry.content:
I found dbmssslib.so version 720, but it doesn't work of course.

Loading DB library '/usr/sap/TST/SYS/exe/run/dbmssslib.so' ...
Library '/usr/sap/TST/SYS/exe/run/dbmssslib.so' loaded
*** ERROR => Version mismatch between kernel (640.00) and DBSL shared library (720.00)

I searched SWDC, but didn't found it...

entry.title: EXCEPTION SEGMENT UNKNOWN RAISED error while calling RFC IDOCTYPE_READ_COMPLETE in Biztalk Middlewar
entry.content:
Hello Mates,

Good Day!

Currently we are facing issue when importing the extended idocs from SAP S4 to biztalk with IDOC segment release 701. We tried changing the WE20 outbound partner profiles parameter idoc release to 701 and also in T-code WE82 but no luck. All segments are in released stated and unlocked and also verified AUTH Issue.

I highly doubt the feasibility and compatability if SAP S4 actually accepts 701 release or not?!!!

Flow:

SAP S4 (idoc extension with 701 release)  -> MS Biztalk -> EDI Partners

Error:

Error while retrieving or generating the WSDL. Adapter message: Details: ErrorCode=RFC_EXCEPTION. ErrorGroup=RFC_ERROR_APPLICATION_EXCEPTION. SapErrorMessage=EXCEPTION SEGMENT_UNKNOWN RAISED.  AdapterErrorMessage=Error returned by RfcCallReceiveEx while calling RFC: IDOCTYPE_READ_COMPLETE..

 

Screenshot:

Thanks and Regards,

Rajesh PS

entry.title: We require a Profit Center-wise Plan vs Actual report.
entry.content: Looking for guidance on generating a Profit Center-wise Plan vs Actual report in SAP. Any standard report suggestions or best practices would be appreciated.

entry.title: Created By User Changed After /SAPAPO/CCR Transfer from APO to ECC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We observed a scenario in our APO–ECC integration landscape where, after executing a repair/transfer activity in transaction /SAPAPO/CCR, the “Created By” user of the process/planned order in ECC (COOISPI) is showing as the user who executed the CCR transfer.

Scenario:

  1. As part of clearing CIF inconsistencies plant-wise through /SAPAPO/CCR, users execute transfer/repair activities without identifying any specific order individually.
  2. After the inconsistencies are corrected and orders are recreated/transferred in ECC, the “Created By” field in COOISPI shows the user who executed the CCR activity.

Questions:

  • Is this standard SAP behavior?
  • Does CCR technically recreate the order using the logged-in user ID?
  • Is it possible to retain the original creator or RFC user instead of the CCR execution user?
  • We also observed that this behavior is happening only for Sales Order related planned/process orders which are recreated or converted by the CCR execution user. Other SFG level material orders are not showing this behavior. Is there any specific reason for this difference?

Environment:
APO PPDS integrated with ECC Process Orders.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP partners supporting BACKINT/SPLITINT interface
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to verify if this is true but I am unable to access this note

SAP Note: 83792 - SAP partners supporting BACKINT/SPLITINT interface stating that SAP is not supporting this interface anymore: no SAP support is available for problems, malfunctions, or failures in connection with the use of such external backup or storage solutions.

This is the link AI provided but doesn't work -  https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/83792

entry.title: Foreign currency valuation Local Currency to Group Currency
entry.content:
Hello, I hope you can help me resolve a question regarding foreign currency valuation at period-end (F.05).

when using a group currency that differs from the local currency, specifically for open-item managed accounts.

Is it mandatory to have an additional account to record the difference?

Since a different ledger is involved, I would prefer the system to post the entry to the same account holding the difference—just as it does for accounts that are not open-item managed.

Is this possible?

The issue is that the client does not want to add any more accounts to their chart of accounts.
